Spanish21 Strategy Support

Welcome to the official support page for Spanish21 Strategy.

Spanish21 Strategy is a training app for learning and practicing Spanish 21 basic strategy with realistic table flow, configurable rules, and instant decision feedback.

Quick Links

  • Privacy Policy
  • Email Support

Contact Support

If you need help, want to report a bug, or have a suggestion for the app, contact:

  • Support email: taylorrubanovich@gmail.com

When possible, include:

  • your device model
  • your Android or iOS version
  • the app version
  • a short description of the issue
  • screenshots if relevant

FAQ

What is Spanish21 Strategy?

Spanish21 Strategy is a mobile training app designed to help players practice correct Spanish 21 basic strategy decisions under different table-rule configurations.

Does the app use real money or offer gambling?

No. Spanish21 Strategy is a practice and training app only. It does not offer real-money gambling.

Which rules can I practice?

The app supports multiple Spanish 21 rule variations, including dealer soft 17 settings, deck counts, surrender and forfeit behavior, and maximum doubling options.

Does the app save my settings?

Yes. The app may save selected table rules and in-game preferences locally on your device so your setup is remembered between sessions.

Does the app collect personal data?

At this time, the app does not require an account and does not intentionally collect personal information. For details, see the Privacy Policy.

How do I report a strategy discrepancy or bug?

Please email taylorrubanovich@gmail.com with the issue details, and include screenshots or step-by-step reproduction notes if possible.

How do I remove locally saved settings?

You can remove locally stored app settings by uninstalling the app or clearing the app’s storage from your device settings.

Privacy

You can review the full privacy policy here:

  • Privacy Policy for Spanish21 Strategy

Response Time

Support requests are typically answered by email. Response times may vary depending on volume.
